use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and interfaces
Destructive action buttons with visual warning states
Navigation and link-style buttons with underline hover
Icon-only buttons for compact UI toolbars
ai_summary: A reusable Button component from the shadcn/ui design system featuring multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition patterns and CVA for variant management. Includes hover states, focus-visible accessibility, and disabled states with smooth transitions. Designed as a foundational atomic component for building accessible React interfaces across various industries.
